title: Mailchimp vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Omnisend. We break down pricing, features, and performance to help you choose the right email marketing tool.
intro: Mailchimp and Omnisend are both freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Mailchimp is ideal for beginners and general marketing, while Omnisend specializes in e-commerce with integrated SMS and push notifications. Read on to see which platform fits your business needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, automation, A/B testing, segmentation
comparison_table.tool_b: Drag-drop editor, omnichannel automation, advanced segmentation
Included with SMS and push notifications

choose_a_if: You're a beginner or small business looking for an affordable, general-purpose email marketing solution
You need a larger free tier with support for up to 500 contacts
You prefer a simpler platform focused primarily on email marketing
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce business and need email, SMS, and push notifications in one platform
You want pre-built workflows and a product picker for easier campaign creation
You prioritize customer support quality and user satisfaction (based on Trustpilot ratings)

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Mailchimp excels for beginners and general email marketing with a larger free tier, while Omnisend is superior for e-commerce businesses needing integrated SMS and push notifications. Omnisend has higher customer satisfaction ratings, but Mailchimp offers better value for budget-conscious users.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Omnisend?
faq.a: Mailchimp is slightly cheaper at $13/month compared to Omnisend's $16/month for paid plans. However, Mailchimp's free tier supports 500 contacts versus Omnisend's 250, making Mailchimp more cost-effective for small businesses staying on the free plan.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and campaign data. However, switching means losing access to Omnisend's SMS and push notification features unless Mailchimp adds these capabilities. Plan your migration carefully to ensure data integrity during the transfer.
